theory.name: UGMT
theory.positioning: UGMT is the mathematical umbrella above ICSPB, UCESD, constructive parameter theory, and GUIT. It treats intelligence theory as the algorithmic/operational projection of a more general constrained mathematical system.
theory.formal: UGMT = (ICSPB, UCESD, CPT, GUIT, GFR, Theta*)

verdict.core_answer: GUIT and the unified math theory are not separate directions. GUIT is the intelligence-facing layer; UGMT is the more abstract mathematical layer that organizes encoding geometry, online dynamics, constructive training, gauge compression, and eventual unique parameter generation.
